top3.sql:
SELECT 
    c.id,
    COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1)) AS percentage
FROM 
    cards c
LEFT JOIN 
    foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE 
    c.isStorySpotlight = 1 
    AND (fd.text IS NULL OR fd.text = '')
GROUP BY 
    c.id;

SELECT 
    c.id,
    COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE asciiName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%')) AS percentage
FROM 
    cards c
LEFT JOIN 
    foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.uuid
WHERE 
    c.asciiName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%'
    AND (fd.text IS NULL OR fd.text = '')
GROUP BY 
    c.id;

SELECT 
    c.id,
    COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1)) AS percentage
FROM 
    cards c
LEFT JOIN 
    foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE 
    c.isStorySpotlight = 1 
    AND (fd.text IS NULL OR fd.text = '')
GROUP BY 
    c.id;

SELECT 
    c.id,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE asciiName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%') AS total_story_spotlight,
    COUNT(*) AS count_without_text,
    COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE asciiName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%') AS percentage
FROM 
    cards c
LEFT JOIN 
    foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.uuid
WHERE 
    c.asciiName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%'
    AND (fd.text IS NULL OR fd.text = '' OR fd.text = '')
GROUP BY 
    c.id
ORDER BY 
    c.id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    c.id,
    COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1)) AS percentage
FROM 
    cards c
LEFT JOIN 
    foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE 
    c.isStorySpotlight = 1 
    AND (fd.text IS NULL OR fd.text = '')
GROUP BY 
    c.id;
